searxng._comment: Category-aware web search and page scraping. Requires a SearXNG instance.

playwright._comment: Browser automation and screenshots. Requires: npx playwright install chromium

google-trends._comment: Google Trends data for search interest, seasonality, and related queries.

google-news-trends._comment: Google News trending topics and news-based trend signals.

app-store._comment: App store search, listings, ratings, and reviews for iOS and Android.

pandoc._comment: Document conversion (Markdown to PDF, DOCX, HTML). Requires: brew install pandoc
